allow: Bash(node -e "const jimp = require\('jimp'\); console.log\('jimp version:', jimp.version || 'available'\)")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./src/pages.json'\); console.log\('Main pages:', j.pages.length\); console.log\('SubPackages:', j.subPackages.length\); j.subPackages.forEach\(s => console.log\(' -', s.root, ':', s.pages.length, 'pages'\)\); console.log\('TabBar pages:', j.tabBar.list.length\)")
